title: Builder's Boundry
description: Make your houses, taverns, and villages feel more alive than ever with Builder's Bounty, a pack of decorative accessories in perfect vanilla Minecraft style!
body:
![Вӯ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) Bring your Minecraft builds to life with **Builder's Bounty**, a collection of decorative blocks and items designed to seamlessly blend with the game's vanilla aesthetic. This project is a Data Pack / Mod so to install it properly pls type /reload.вҖӢ ### вңЁ Features - Functional Decorations: Add lamps, trophies, beverages, and seasonal items like Halloween scarecrows to enhance your builds. - Vanilla-Compatible Textures: Designed to match Minecraft's default look for a cohesive experience. - Lightweight and Server-Friendly: Ideal for builders, roleplayers, and themed servers.вҖӢ ### рҹ–јпёҸ Gallery ![Вӯ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e089b7a0368771fbe24e8600fe2a8f425881c0.png) ### Items

# Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you вҖ“ whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
